title: China-Australia agreement on jet fuel cooperation

contents:
# China-Australia agreement on jet fuel cooperation

## Overview
Chinese and Australian foreign ministers agreed to cooperate on jet fuel shipments. This agreement remained characterized as an important "first step" in addressing supply chain issues.

## Details
The agreement remained made during talks between Australian Foreign Minister Penny Wong and Chinese counterpart Wang Yi. However, the search result does not provide specific operational details, quantities, timeline, or implementation specifics beyond describing it as a "first step."

**Location**: Beijing, China

## Source Context
The information comes from Twitter @scmpnews, which covers South China Morning Post, China military, Taiwan, Asia-Pacific security. The reporting matches their typical area of focus.

## Significance
This development adds to the ongoing pattern of activity tracked through this source. Analysts following South China Morning Post will likely watch for follow-up reporting.
